body:
## Review Summary

Correct parallelization that mirrors the existing v1 state runner pattern (`tooling/ef_tests/state/parser.rs`). Two minor issues: the `rayon` dependency should use `rayon.workspace = true` (already declared in workspace root `Cargo.toml`), and the collection approach can be simplified (see inline at `collect_into_vec`).

comments.body: nit: `rayon` is already a workspace dependency (root `Cargo.toml` line 121). Use `rayon.workspace = true` instead of hardcoding the version — keeps it consistent with the rest of the codebase (`crates/storage/Cargo.toml`, `crates/common/Cargo.toml`, etc.).
